tests.name: Create player with valid username
tests.why: Verifies that a new player is created and receives a server-generated integer player_id.

tests.name: Reject invalid username with special characters
tests.why: Ensures the server enforces the alphanumeric-plus-underscores username pattern and returns a descriptive error.

tests.name: Create game with valid parameters
tests.why: Verifies that a new game is created in waiting_setup status with the correct grid size.

tests.name: Reject game creation with grid_size below minimum
tests.why: Ensures the server rejects grid sizes below the allowed minimum of 5.

tests.name: Reject firing out of turn
tests.why: Ensures the server enforces turn order and returns 403 when a player fires out of turn.

tests.name: Reject duplicate fire at same cell
tests.why: Ensures the server returns 409 Conflict when a player fires at coordinates they already targeted.

tests.name: Get game detail returns correct structure
tests.why: Verifies that GET game detail returns players array with ships_remaining and current_turn_player_id.

tests.name: Reject joining a non-existent game
tests.why: Ensures the server returns 404 when attempting to join a game that does not exist.

tests.name: Player stats return correct fields
tests.why: Verifies that player stats endpoint returns all required fields including accuracy as a float.

tests.name: Health endpoint returns ok status
tests.why: Verifies the health check endpoint is responsive and returns the expected status.
